steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “However” marks a sharp turn: the previous sentence described what fossil studies concluded, but this sentence pivots to identify a problem. Specifically, many fossil studies “relied on incomplete data sets” — the sentence is flagging a weakness in those studies.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
The sentence's function is to describe a limitation of the fossil studies about turtle origins, which is precisely what choice B states.

The other three choices discuss unrelated subject matter (fossil examination tools, crocodile evolution) or criticize the wrong type of study (genetic instead of fossil).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
